name: Signing keyid is listed in the revocation list

test_harness_state.$comment: Pre-populate revocation list with test-ed25519-2026 revoked. Harness sets revocation_list = { revoked_kids: ['test-ed25519-2026'], revoked_jtis: [], fresh: true, issuer: 'https://seller.example.com', updated: '2026-04-18T14:00:00Z', next_update: '2026-04-18T14:15:00Z' }.

$comment: Revocation check runs BEFORE cryptographic verify (step 9, before step 10) — this prevents cheap amplification where an attacker replays a revoked key's valid signature and forces the verifier to do an Ed25519/ECDSA verify for every rejection. Verifier MUST reject at step 9 without computing the signature base or running crypto verification.
